messages.message: This page shows active events that need a manager decision. Some decisions apply immediately, others remain active until the event expires.
There are currently no open club events.
This reaction remains active until the event expires.
This event has already been resolved.
A reaction has already been selected for this event.
{playername} seems increasingly unhappy. The situation may affect his happiness and the club atmosphere.
Costs some money for a personal talk and support, but improves his happiness.
No direct cost, but happiness drops and the board is slightly irritated.
The player is placed on the transfer market. His happiness drops slightly.
Your sponsor {sponsorname} is facing public criticism. The club must decide how to react.
Costs money, but protects fan and board satisfaction.
Brings short-term money, but hurts fans and the board.
No direct cost, but fans and board react negatively.
A local scout recommends {youthplayer}, age {youth_age}, position {youth_position}. The player could join your youth team.
The player joins your youth team. A small training compensation is due.
Damage has been detected at {teamname}'s stadium. You can repair it immediately or risk lower attendance.
High repair cost, but no further restriction.
No immediate cost, but attendance rate drops until the event expires.
If no decision is made in time, an expensive emergency repair is needed and the board is unhappy.
